title: 1981-04-16_Pat_115.txt
key_claims: *VALIS* intentionally traps existentialist readers: it accurately portrays the realistic "thrownness" (Verfallenheit) of the human condition, but then offers an absurd, transmundane, Gnostic solution that deeply offends their nihilism.
Dick realizes that *VALIS* was written backward: he knew the solution (soteriological rescue) firsthand, and constructed the problem of Fat's madness to account for it.
Tagore is identified as the ultimate Gnostic/Manichaean entity: Jesus patibilis, the suffering form of Primal Man, who pervades the world and suffers our sins until forced to withdraw.

The hyper-field AB is the *mechanistic means* by which two 180° coaxial mirror worlds can simultaneously co-exist; the Gnostic covert world is carried as a secondary signal on the same sine wave as the official world.
recurring_concepts: **Jesus Patibilis**: The Manichaean concept of the divine light scattered into darkness, suffering patiently across all creation until unmixed.
reading_excerpt: *VALIS* intentionally traps existentialist readers: it accurately portrays the realistic "thrownness" (Verfallenheit) of the human condition, but then offers an absurd, transmundane, Gnostic solution that deeply offends their nihilism.
